name: Ethoca
description: Ethoca, a Mastercard company, runs a global network that shares fraud and dispute data between issuers and merchants, enabling merchants to refund fraudulent transactions before a chargeback is filed. It exposes Alerts and Consumer Clarity

seo.title: Ethoca — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Ethoca: Ethoca, a Mastercard company, runs a global network that shares fraud and dispute data between issuers and merchants, enabling merchants to refund fraud

when_to_use: Pre-chargeback fraud alert via Ethoca Alerts network
Consumer Clarity order details API to reduce friendly fraud
Rapid Dispute Resolution to settle disputes before filing
Issuer-merchant data sharing to prevent duplicate chargebacks
Fraud signal enrichment for merchant risk operations

pros: Cuts chargebacks by refunding before dispute filed
cons: Only helps after fraud is already reported to issuer
Requires enrollment with each issuing bank
Not a prevention layer, a loss-control one
review.verdict: A must-have for large merchants to bleed less on chargebacks, but it is damage control, not prevention.
review.best_for: Large e-commerce merchants and PSPs with meaningful friendly-fraud and chargeback exposure.
review.not_for: Small merchants with low dispute volume or those wanting upstream fraud blocking.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
